title: Cheese Grater with Container and Lid & Peeler Set - Vegetable Fruit Multi-Function Stainless Steel Kitchen Utensil Kit with Black Food Plastic Storage Stable Box - Hand Chopper Graters & Peelers
features: For grating cheese, and peeling and grating vegetables and fruit
This multi-functional set includes 2 attachable stainless steel graters, fine and coarse, a matching box with a lid and a peeler with two stainless steel heads
Perfect for cheeses such as Parmesan, Cheddar, Gouda and many more as well as vegetables and fruit
RUBBER PROTECTION from below foot of the container, so it does not slide over the board
description: You get - everything what you want, need and desire with the HOLUCK Grater and Peeler Set with Container from KitchenBe1 Our excellent kit is a great alternative to separate items. This cool product combines many functions in one set. This is a good gadget for your home. TWO SIZES OF GRATER AND DOUBLE HEAD PEELER Each box contains: - 2 sizes of rotary stainless steel flakes of grater - large and small - PP container + lid (without BPA) - Double head straight peeler (swivel and serrated) with displaceable plastic handle Why people choose our Grater and Peeler Set with Container? MULTI-FUNCTIONAL - This small set of grater and peeler contains a multi-functional food grater with a PP storage container (BPA free) + white fit lid and double head peeler with displaceable plastic handle. You can peel by a serrated peeler or swivel peeler. The metal sharp blade units of this set have a stainless steel. The grater have 2 sizes of rotary stainless steel flakes - large and small. This is a versatile professional set, not only for fruits and vegetables, but also for cheeses. PP PLASTIC (WITHOUT BPA) + STAINLESS STEEL Easy exchange of grater pads The food storage container could be closed immediately by lid The ergonomic peeler grip Two rotary stainless steel tips in one peeler - swivel and serrated Perfect for salad toppings and decorations You will never want to get back to traditional tools ever again! Our packaging case make our practical set a perfect yet not expensive gift! This tool is one of new cooking gadgets in the chef kitchens! Specifications: Grater Material: Stainless Steel 18/0 + PP Size: 18.5x11x7.5cm Weight: 256g Colour: Black Peeler Material: Stainless Steel 420 + PP Size: 16.5x3.1x1.7cm Weight: 30g Colour: Green
